stemHtml: When a passenger is obliged to travel due to judicial proceedings, each Contracting State shall ensure that…

options.a: The pilot-in-command is informed and the operator has a programme in place to manage such situations in its security regulations.
options.b: The aircraft operator is asked for permission and the pilot-in-command is informed.
options.c: The aircraft operator and the pilot-in-command are asked for permission.
